use_cases: Creating dramatic text reveal effects on landing pages
Adding animated hero headings with a glitch aesthetic
Enhancing typography with random character scramble transitions
Building interactive section headers that animate on scroll
ai_summary: SpecialText is an atomic typography component that creates a glitch-like text reveal animation, cycling through random characters before settling on the actual text. Uses scroll-triggered in-view detection from motion/react and supports configurable animation speed and delay for creating dramatic text effects.
